sections.paragraph: ἄφρων, ον, gen. ονος [ἀ-priv., φρήν] ‘not making use of common sense or ordinary intelligence’, characteristic of one who fails to take account of various aspects before drawing a conclusion or adopting a course of action, senseless, foolish Lk 11:40; 12:20; Ro 2:20; Eph 5:17; 1 Pt 2:15.
